# getObjectProperty()

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function getObjectProperty(value: unknown, key: string): unknown;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts:41](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts#L41)

Safely reads a property from an `unknown` value using
[Reflect.get](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference).

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type      | Description                               |
| --------- | --------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| `value`   | `unknown` | The value to read from (may be any type). |
| `key`     | `string`  | The property key to access on the object. |

## Returns

`unknown`

The property value, or `undefined` if `value` is not a
non-null object.

## Remarks

Returns `undefined` when `value` is not a non-null object, avoiding
the need for manual `typeof` / `null` guards at each call site.
Used extensively by [getStringProperty](getStringProperty.md),
`getRegisteredTools`, `getSchemaShape`, and the
MCP response parsers.
